initial_analysis.rough_description: A group of people are gathered outdoors for a performance, with a circle of men in the foreground playing drums with drumsticks. A microphone is positioned in the center, and numerous observers are standing around the group, some recording with mobile devices.

object_seeds.label: drumstick
object_seeds.notes: One of the several drumsticks being used by the performers.

object_seeds.label: microphone
object_seeds.notes: The microphone positioned in the center of the drum circle.

object_seeds.label: performer
object_seeds.notes: The primary drummer in the center of the circle.

object_seeds.label: baseball cap
object_seeds.tracking_prompt: black and white baseball cap with icon
object_seeds.notes: A distinctively patterned cap worn by one of the participants in the foreground.

source_object_seed.label: performer
source_object_seed.notes: The primary drummer in the center of the circle.

sound_events.description: Loud, intense vocal chanting and singing by the drum circle members.
Rhythmic drumming beats played continuously by the performers on a large drum.
